name: Brainrot Merge
author: Poki
description: Brainrot Merge is a merge game where your goal is to unlock all the hilarious brainrot characters! Simply drag and drop tiles onto the board. When two of the same tile meet, they merge into a brand-new character. Start your journey with the iconic Ballerina Cappuccina and keep merging to discover more silly favorites. Can you unlock them all and complete your collection? How to play Brainrot Merge? Click and hold to move tiles, release to place them. Who created Brainrot Merge? Brainrot Merge is created by Playrea. Play their other games on Poki: Brainrot Puzzle , Pocket Zoo and Guess the Emojis ! How can I play Brainrot Merge for free? You can play Brainrot Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Brainrot Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Brainrot Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
